\tzpentry{ID5744}{Hamiltonian Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5744 introduces Hamiltonian Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{d\mathcal{H}_{total}}{dt} = 0 \end{equation}
